keyTerms.Pearl River Delta: The world's largest manufacturing region in southern China, home to millions of migrant factory workers
keyTerms.displacement: The loss of employment caused by automation, distinguished from unemployment by its structural and permanent nature
keyTerms.skills canyon: The vast gap between the capabilities of displaced manufacturing workers and the requirements of tech-economy jobs
keyTerms.portable benefits: Social safety net benefits — healthcare, pension, unemployment insurance — that follow workers across jobs and locations
keyTerms.economic ecosystem: The interdependent network of factory workers, remittances, rural families, and urban economies that automation disrupts
